title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report - AI Agent & LLM Application Development
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 1 completed course(s), and 13 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 90.4%, completion is 100%, pass rate is 92.3%, and average score is 7.88/10. Total training hours are 188 and scaled cost is 9.6. Overall effectiveness classification is Risk. Management interpretation: The training course 'AI Agent & LLM Application Development' achieved a completion rate of 100% with an overall attendance rate of 90.4%. The pass rate stands at 92.3%, and the average score is 7.88 out of 10. Despite these positive metrics, the overall effectiveness classification is marked as Risk, indicating potential areas for improvement.
insights: AI Agent & LLM Application Development has an effectiveness score of 89.47 in the selected scope.
2 outstanding trainees met the star learner rule: score >= 9.0 and full attendance.
1 high-priority L&D NORM flag was triggered.

However, the effectiveness classification as Risk suggests that while trainees are completing the course, there may be underlying issues affecting their overall performance and retention of knowledge.
Notably, one trainee requires additional support, as indicated by the governance flags.
recommendations: Assign a coaching owner, buddy support, and targeted practice resources for the flagged learner.
Additionally, consider reviewing course content and delivery methods to address the effectiveness classification and ensure that all trainees achieve a satisfactory understanding of the material.

checklist.detail: Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sheets were mapped to simulated sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count × total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one assessment/pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.

checklist.check: Consistency: course ID, trainee ID, period
checklist.detail: Cross-source course IDs and pass-status logic were checked against the catalog.

normFlags.action: Flag for coaching; assign buddy or practice resources

supportNeededTrainees.reason: Below pass threshold or attendance below 70%

supportNeededGroups.reason: At least one learner is below pass threshold or attendance policy.
